prompt: A spontaneous airport tarmac photo taken during a sunny afternoon, looks like someone called her name and she turned just as they pressed the shutter. A young woman stands beneath the wing of a large commercial airplane, her face 100% photorealistic—hat held casually in one hand, the other hand tucking a strand of her long wavy blonde hair behind her ear, a soft genuine smile on her lips, eyes crinkling with warmth. She wears a loose flowing black top with a boat neckline, high-waisted cream wide-leg trousers, simple sandals, large dark aviator-style sunglasses, her wide-brimmed woven sun hat held loosely in her hand. The frame is slightly tilted, caught mid-turn. Low-angle shot, making her and the airplane appear grand and monumental. Bright direct afternoon sun, harsh highlights on her skin and the white aircraft surface, deep shadows under the wing and her chin. The massive white fuselage with a row of small oval windows, the underside of the wing, and a large jet engine on the left side of the frame. Motion blur on her hair blowing in the wind and her hand tucking her hair. Slight overexposure on the white aircraft surface, heavy grain from phone camera, warm golden highlights, JPEG artifacts. Natural skin with visible pores, soft facial sheen, a tiny freckle on her nose, no beauty filter. A stray cat tail curls around a luggage cart wheel at the bottom right corner. Dutch angle 3°, 9:16
promptEn: A spontaneous airport tarmac photo taken during a sunny afternoon, looks like someone called her name and she turned just as they pressed the shutter. A young woman stands beneath the wing of a large commercial airplane, her face 100% photorealistic—hat held casually in one hand, the other hand tucking a strand of her long wavy blonde hair behind her ear, a soft genuine smile on her lips, eyes crinkling with warmth. She wears a loose flowing black top with a boat neckline, high-waisted cream wide-leg trousers, simple sandals, large dark aviator-style sunglasses, her wide-brimmed woven sun hat held loosely in her hand. The frame is slightly tilted, caught mid-turn. Low-angle shot, making her and the airplane appear grand and monumental. Bright direct afternoon sun, harsh highlights on her skin and the white aircraft surface, deep shadows under the wing and her chin. The massive white fuselage with a row of small oval windows, the underside of the wing, and a large jet engine on the left side of the frame. Natural skin with visible pores, soft facial sheen, a tiny freckle on her nose, no beauty filter. A stray cat tail curls around a luggage cart wheel at the bottom right corner. Dutch angle 3°, 9:16
promptZh: 一张在阳光明媚的午后拍摄的机场停机坪抓拍照片，仿佛有人喊了她的名字，她刚转过头时快门便被按下。一位年轻女性站在大型商用飞机的机翼下，面部呈现 100% 的照片级真实感——一只手随意地拿着帽子，另一只手正将一缕 长波浪金发 别到耳后，嘴角带着真诚柔和的微笑，双眼因笑意而微微眯起。她身穿 宽松飘逸的黑色船领上衣，搭配高腰米色阔腿裤、简约凉鞋，佩戴一副大号深色飞行员墨镜，宽檐编织遮阳帽被随意地拿在手中。画面略微倾斜，捕捉到她转身的瞬间。低角度拍摄，使她和飞机显得宏伟壮观。明亮的午后直射阳光，在她的皮肤和白色的飞机表面形成强烈的亮部，机翼下和下巴处有深邃的阴影。巨大的白色机身排列着一排小椭圆窗户，机翼下方，画面左侧可见大型喷气发动机。风中飘动的发丝和整理头发的手部带有动态模糊。白色飞机表面略微过曝，带有手机拍摄的厚重噪点、温暖的金色高光以及 JPEG 压缩痕迹。自然的皮肤质感，可见毛孔、柔和的面部光泽，鼻尖有一颗小雀斑，无美颜滤镜。画面右下角，一只流浪猫的尾巴正绕在行李推车的轮子上。荷兰式倾斜角度 3°，9:16
